completion_summary: Bound the completed current-contract PPO and SAC claims into a machine-readable RL integration decision. Audited 13 SHA-256-bound inputs, both empty checkpoint indexes, both fail-closed preflight/outcome reports, exact preflight contract/replay evidence, 8/8 clean-load evidence per method, frozen observation/manifest/sidecar requirements, completed claim histories, and quarantined historical archives. Final decisions: PPO=selection_failed, SAC=selection_failed, parent RL development not ready, zero selected current checkpoints, formal_results_present=false, benchmark_claim_allowed=false, and Bench remains sealed. Global method-freeze was intentionally not modified or claimed closed because its snapshot is stale and Live-LLM remains collaborator-owned. Validation: 54 RL-focused/adjacent tests passed; Ruff, format, mypy, claim, JSON, digest, source-cleanliness, and origin/main checks passed. The separate global method-freeze test retains a stale missing-task ordering assertion and remains outside this claim, consistent with the blocked global snapshot. Reference repositories and Bench were not accessed. PPO archive 0e96da630a787517a3e69fa715100f8b02aeccb202d2a03e493fbe4543763887; SAC archive e76254f011e6e73880fc77e4900ea2f352b4205c0c714564b4fb82d40b23dd42. Implementation/audit source 8e6a7c7; integration report commit 915cf81.
notes: Depends on completed current-contract PPO and SAC claims already visible on origin/main. Reads but does not modify their reports, indexes, historical archives, frozen RL method contract, or global method-freeze evidence. Live-LLM remains collaborator-owned; this claim may conclude RL selection_failed while global method-freeze remains blocked. Bench and reference feedback are forbidden.
scope: Audit and bind current-contract PPO/SAC Train/Dev outcomes into a machine-readable fail-closed RL integration readiness decision without modifying global method-freeze, Live-LLM, Bench, protocol, or release-owned paths.
